description: Locate or register visitor Margaret Chen (Nextera Consulting) in Jolly Lobby Track. If she is not in the system, use the details provided in 'Visitor_Info.txt' on the desktop. Generate her visitor badge and save the output to /home/ga/Documents/visitor_badge_output.pdf. If PDF generation is not possible, save a screenshot of the badge preview to /home/ga/Documents/visitor_badge_preview.png.
